languages.original_text: "An attempted unauthorised breach of the security perimeter created by the xenos intelligence may cause a critical increase in the risk of detection by the enemies of Humanity. Exhorting the unit Jae Heydari to observe standard protocols when encountering suspicious objects."

languages.text: "Попытка несанкционированного проникновения за периметр охранных систем, созданных ксеноразумом, может привести к критическому повышению риска обнаружения нашей группы Врагами Человечества. Призываю единицу "Джай Хейдари" к соблюдению стандартных предписаний при столкновении с подозрительными объектами".

"An attempted unauthorised breach of the security perimeter created by the xenos intelligence may cause a critical increase in the risk of detection by the enemies of Humanity. Exhorting the unit Jae Heydari to observe standard protocols when encountering suspicious objects."

Призываю единицу "Джай Хейдари" к соблюдению стандартных предписаний при столкновении с подозрительными объектами".

"An attempted unauthorised breach of the security perimeter created by the xenos intelligence may cause a critical increase in the risk of detection by the enemies of Humanity. Exhorting the unit Jae Heydari to observe standard protocols when encountering suspicious objects."

languages.text: 「異星人の知能によるセキュリティ・パーミターの未承認の試みは、人類の敵による検出の危険性を重大に高める可能性があります。疑わしい物体を遭遇した際には、標準的な手順に従うように、ジャイ・ヘイダリー部隊に促します」
languages.original_text: "An attempted unauthorised breach of the security perimeter created by the xenos intelligence may cause a critical increase in the risk of detection by the enemies of Humanity. Exhorting the unit Jae Heydari to observe standard protocols when encountering suspicious objects."

traits.locale_text: 「異星人の知能によるセキュリティ・パーミターの未承認の試みは、人類の敵による検出の危険性を重大に高める可能性があります。疑わしい物体を遭遇した際には、標準的な手順に従うように、ジャイ・ヘイダリー部隊に促します。」

languages.text: « Tenter de pénétrer sans autorisation dans le périmètre de sécurité établi par l'intelligence xénos pourrait entraîner une hausse critique du risque de détection par les ennemis de l'humanité. J'exhorte l'unité Jae Heydari à se conformer aux protocoles standards régissant les interactions avec des éléments suspects. »
languages.original_text: "An attempted unauthorised breach of the security perimeter created by the xenos intelligence may cause a critical increase in the risk of detection by the enemies of Humanity. Exhorting the unit Jae Heydari to observe standard protocols when encountering suspicious objects."

traits.locale_text: « Tenter de pénétrer sans autorisation dans le périmètre de sécurité établi par l'intelligence xénos pourrait entraîner une hausse critique du risque de détection par les ennemis de l'humanité. J'exhorte l'unité Jae Heydari à se conformer aux protocoles standards régissant les interactions avec des éléments suspects. »

languages.text: "Ein unautorisierter Versuch, den von der Xenox-Intelligenz errichteten Sicherheitsgürtel zu durchbrechen, könnte das Risiko, von den Feinden der Menschheit entdeckt zu werden, deutlich erhöhen. Die Einheit Jae Heydari ist angehalten, im Umgang mit verdächtigen Objekten die Standardprotokolle einzuhalten."
languages.original_text: "An attempted unauthorised breach of the security perimeter created by the xenos intelligence may cause a critical increase in the risk of detection by the enemies of Humanity. Exhorting the unit Jae Heydari to observe standard protocols when encountering suspicious objects."

traits.locale_text: "Ein unautorisierter Versuch, den von der Xenox-Intelligenz errichteten Sicherheitsgürtel zu durchbrechen, könnte das Risiko, von den Feinden der Menschheit entdeckt zu werden, deutlich erhöhen. Die Einheit Jae Heydari ist angehalten, im Umgang mit verdächtigen Objekten die Standardprotokolle einzuhalten."

languages.text: "Zeno zekâsınca oluşturulan güvenlik çemberinin izinsiz ihlal girişimi, İnsanlığın düşmanları tarafından tespit edilme riskinde kritik bir artışa neden olabilir. Jae Heydari birimini şüpheli nesnelerle karşılaştığında standart protokollere uymaya davet ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "An attempted unauthorised breach of the security perimeter created by the xenos intelligence may cause a critical increase in the risk of detection by the enemies of Humanity. Exhorting the unit Jae Heydari to observe standard protocols when encountering suspicious objects."

traits.locale_text: "Zeno zekâsınca oluşturulan güvenlik çemberinin izinsiz ihlal girişimi, İnsanlığın düşmanları tarafından tespit edilme riskinde kritik bir artışa neden olabilir. Jae Heydari birimini şüpheli nesnelerle karşılaştığında standart protokollere uymaya davet ediyorum."

languages.text: «Una intrusión no autorizada en el perímetro de seguridad creado por la inteligencia xenos podría causar un aumento crítico en el riesgo de ser detectados por los enemigos de la Humanidad. Exhorto a la unidad Jae Heydari para que se ciña a los protocolos normativos de todo encuentro con un objeto sospechoso».
languages.original_text: "An attempted unauthorised breach of the security perimeter created by the xenos intelligence may cause a critical increase in the risk of detection by the enemies of Humanity. Exhorting the unit Jae Heydari to observe standard protocols when encountering suspicious objects."

traits.locale_text: «Una intrusión no autorizada en el perímetro de seguridad creado por la inteligencia xenos podría causar un aumento crítico en el riesgo de ser detectados por los enemigos de la Humanidad. Exhorto a la unidad Jae Heydari para que se ciña a los protocolos normativos de todo encuentro con un objeto sospechoso».

languages.text: “试图未经授权突破异形智能体设立的安全防线，将大幅增加被人类之敌发现的致命风险。现规劝婕伊·海达利单位在遭遇可疑物体时，务必遵守标准流程。”
languages.original_text: "An attempted unauthorised breach of the security perimeter created by the xenos intelligence may cause a critical increase in the risk of detection by the enemies of Humanity. Exhorting the unit Jae Heydari to observe standard protocols when encountering suspicious objects."

traits.locale_text: “试图未经授权突破异形智能体设立的安全防线，将大幅增加被人类之敌发现的致命风险。现规劝婕伊·海达利单位在遭遇可疑物体时，务必遵守标准流程。”
